requirements.summary: Remove the 4th anchor link element from the navigation bar in the Layout component
acceptanceCriteria: The navigation bar contains one fewer link — specifically the 4th link is removed
All remaining navigation links continue to work correctly
The navigation layout looks correct with the remaining links

file_operations.description: Remove the 4th anchor link element from the navigation bar (identified by XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/nav[1]/div[1]/div[1]/a[4]). Keep all other navigation links intact and ensure the remaining links continue to function correctly.
